roleList.hint: Manage roles, core details, and permission assignments from one page.
roleList.actionHint: Create roles, maintain core details, and complete permission assignment from one workspace.
roleList.fieldsValue: id, name, display, description, builtin | id, code, display, category
roleList.permissionSummary: {count} permissions are loaded for role assignment.
roleList.tableHint: Start from the table to edit a role or open permission assignment.
roleList.permissionLoadFailed: Failed to load permission definitions. Showing role list only.
roleList.permissionUnavailable: No assignable permission definitions are loaded for this session.

feedback.permissionCatalogHint: Catalog availability determines whether role assignment can be completed.
feedback.permissionCatalogRestricted: Permission catalog access is not available in this session.
feedback.assignmentStateReadyHint: Permission definitions are loaded, so role assignment can be saved directly.
feedback.assignmentStateUnavailableHint: The role list is available, but permission definitions are not ready yet.
feedback.assignmentStateRestrictedHint: This session can review roles, but permission assignment stays restricted.

form.name: Role Name
form.descriptionPlaceholder: Enter a short role description, optional

permissionDialog.title: Assign Role Permissions
permissionDialog.loadingSelection: Loading the current role permission snapshot for this dialog session.
permissionDialog.selectionLoadFailed: Failed to load the current role permissions, so no replace write was attempted.
permissionDialog.selectionUnavailable: The current role permissions could not be restored safely, so empty replace submission is blocked.
